rows.description: Decr. 3. Mr. Cookes' Payment for D. Shortridge's Benef.
rows.notes: Amounts (£100 0 0) by consensus. Description adopted from gemini-flash, verified against the image as more accurate ('Cookes'', 'D. Shortridge's Benef.') than gpt-5-mini.
rows.english_description: Payment received from Mr Cooke towards Dr Shortridge's benefaction.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment received from Mr Cooke towards Dr Shortridge's benefaction, amounting to £100 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Description and amounts (£5 5s 0d) adopted from gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms 'Kidlington' and amounts, correcting gpt-5-mini's 'Fiddlington' and amount reading of '£0 5s 5d'.
rows.english_description: Receipt towards the cost of surveying the Kidlington estate.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt towards the cost of surveying the Kidlington estate, amounting to £5 5s 0d.

rows.description: & 9. Took out of the College Chest to put into the Funds
rows.notes: Amounts (£370 0 0) by consensus. Description adopted from gemini-flash, with minor correction (space between '&' and '9') and verified against the image ('Funds', not 'hands', and date '& 9.', not 'Jan. 20.').
rows.english_description: Money withdrawn from the college chest to be placed into the college funds.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Money withdrawn from the college chest to be placed into the college funds, amounting to £370 0s 0d.

rows.description: 29. Increment from Mr. Richards Bursar to Xmas
rows.notes: Pounds, shillings, and pence whole (£13 3s 10d) by consensus. Description (date '29.') adopted from gemini-flash. Pence fraction 0.5 (1/2) adopted from gemini-flash; visual verification shows a clear '½' symbol after '10', overriding gpt-5-mini's interpretation of 0.25 (1/4).
rows.english_description: Increment payment received from Mr Richards, the bursar, covering to Christmas.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Increment payment received from Mr Richards, the bursar, covering to Christmas, amounting to £13 3s 10½d.

rows.description: Feb: 9. Recd. of Edw. Charril for Clifton Ferry to Mich.
rows.notes: Amounts (£6 4s 8d) by consensus. Description adopted from gemini-flash, verified against the image as more accurate ('Edw. Charril', 'Mich.') than gpt-5-mini.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment received from Edward Charril for the Clifton Ferry rent up to Michaelmas, amounting to £6 4s 8d.

rows.notes: Amounts (£50 0 0) by consensus. Description adopted from gemini-flash for literal transcription ('10.', not 'Feb. 10.').

rows.notes: Amounts (£30 0 0) by consensus. Description adopted from gemini-flash for literal transcription ('20.', not 'Feb. 20.', and 'Midsummer & Xmas Div:', not 'Mid-summer & Xmas Div.').

rows.english_description_with_amount: Dividend income on a £1,000 investment paid at Midsummer and Christmas, amounting to £30 0s 0d.

rows.description: April 20. Recd. Mr Cooks second payment of Dr. Shortridge's benefaction for the year 1772 to midsummer 1772

rows.english_description: Second installment received from Mr Cook for Dr Shortridge's benefaction covering up to Midsummer 1772.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Second installment received from Mr Cook for Dr Shortridge's benefaction covering up to Midsummer 1772, amounting to £100 0s 0d.

rows.description: May 22 Mr. Jackson's ballance of the Merton Estate
rows.notes: Shillings, pence, and fraction (19s 1 1/2d) by consensus. Description and pounds amount (£221) adopted from gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms 'Merton Estate' and the pounds amount as '221', correcting gpt-5-mini's 'Newton Estate' and '£224'.
rows.english_description: Balance payment received from Mr Jackson in settlement of the Merton estate account.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Balance payment received from Mr Jackson in settlement of the Merton estate account, amounting to £221 19s 1½d.

rows.description: June 22 Recd. of J. Carter towards surveying S. Fewington
rows.notes: Amounts (£5 0 0) by consensus. Description adopted from gemini-flash, verified against the image as more accurate ('June 22' without dot, 'J. Carter', 'S. Fewington') than gpt-5-mini.
rows.english_description: Receipt from J. Carter towards costs of surveying South Fewington.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt from J. Carter towards costs of surveying South Fewington, amounting to £5 0s 0d.

rows.description: Sepr. 24 Recd. of Mr. Newbery Bursar Increment
rows.notes: Pounds, shillings, and pence whole (£58 9s 3d) by consensus. Description adopted from gemini-flash, verified against the image ('Sepr. 24' without dot, 'Bursar', 'Increment'). Pence fraction 0.5 (1/2) adopted from gemini-flash; visual verification shows a small '2' symbol after '3', a common shorthand for 1/2 pence, overriding gpt-5-mini's interpretation of 0.75.
rows.english_description: Increment payment received from Mr Newbery, the bursar.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Increment payment received from Mr Newbery, the bursar, amounting to £58 9s 3½d.
